title: taraxacum multilepis
intro: Taraxacum multilepis, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as a diuretic and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Taraxacum multilepis include supporting liver and kidney function, lowering blood pressure, and reducing symptoms of digestive issues such as constipation and irritable bowel syndrome. The plant's herbal preparations can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, as well as applied topically in the form of salves or creams.
